title: Principal audit post OpenAI synthesis evaluator sequence (393-397)
problem: Tickets 393-397 closed the live OpenAI synthesis evaluator spine (grounding hydration, evaluator artifact, instruction-packet bridge, operator plan status, and runbook docs). A principal audit checkpoint is due before further cloud-synthesis or operator-automation tickets broaden scope.
acceptance_criteria: Audit report records GO/NO-GO for the 393-397 spine with explicit safety boundaries (no accepted graph writes, no CI live HTTP, no public-site operator env).
Audit confirms mock-first defaults remain intact in verify, golden tests, and execute-safe.
Audit lists any follow-on hardening tickets with risk classification before the next implementation ticket.
non_goals: Do not implement new engine features during the audit.
Do not run live OpenAI HTTP as part of the audit.
Do not merge or push without documenting audit verdict.
rollback_plan: Delete the audit report only; no code rollback required.
